name: Broken
description: When you reach 0 HP, your fate is in the balance.

results.text: Unconscious: Fall unconscious for d4 rounds, then awaken with d4 HP.
Broken Limb: Broken or severed limb. Gain the fever condition.
Lost Teeth: Most of your teeth were knocked out. Decrease current Guile by 1.
Debilitating Injury: Roll on the Debilitating Injuries Table.
Haemorrhage: Death in d2 hours unless treated. All Tests are DR16.
DEAD: The gods have called you home. Your saga ends here.
